subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace is located in Udaipur?
question_hi: उदयपुर में किस पर्वती पल्किति है।

question_en: Which palace is known as the Hall of Victory in Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Amber Palace is known as the Hall of Victory because it played a significant role in the history of Rajasthan.
